overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character swimming underwater through ancient submerged ruins and kelp forests. The character explores a sunken civilization with stepped pyramids and rocky cliffs, encountering marine life including fish and manta rays in crystal clear turquoise water.

events.description: character begins ascending and turning away from the stepped pyramid structure

agents.ego_description: swimming along the massive stepped pyramid structure, examining the ancient stonework and vegetation growing on it

entered.detail: massive ancient stone stepped pyramid with horizontal terraces covered in marine growth
palm trees visible above the water surface indicating tropical location
green aquatic plants growing on the stone structure surfaces

segments.scene_description: The character swims alongside a massive ancient stepped pyramid structure in clear turquoise water. Palm trees are visible above the surface, and small fish swim nearby. The character begins ascending and turning away from the structure toward the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open kelp forest with light rays penetrating from surface

events.description: leaves the stepped pyramid structure behind and enters open water with dense kelp forest
large manta ray appears swimming in the distance to the right

agents.ego_description: swimming upward and forward through dense kelp forest, away from the structure into open water

notable_agents.action: large manta ray swimming gracefully through the open water in the distance

entered.detail: tall dense green kelp plants rising from the seabed creating an underwater forest
sunlight penetrating the water surface creating god rays and shimmering patterns
debris or object with parachute-like shape floating in the water column

segments.scene_description: The character ascends into open water filled with dense kelp forest. Sunlight streams down from the surface creating dramatic light rays. A large manta ray swims gracefully in the distance, and a floating parachute-like object drifts in the water. The stepped pyramid fades into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky underwater cliff with coral reefs and schools of fish

events.description: approaching and entering rocky cliff area with colorful coral formations

agents.ego_description: swimming through kelp toward rocky ruins, observing colorful coral and schools of small fish

notable_agents.action: school of small colorful fish swimming near the coral formations on the rocky cliff

entered.detail: large rocky cliff face covered in marine growth and ancient stone structures
vibrant purple and orange coral formations growing on the rocks
remnants of stone architecture built into the cliff face

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a rocky cliff face adorned with colorful coral formations. Schools of small fish swim near the coral. Ancient ruins are visible built into the cliff, and the dense kelp forest gives way to more structured terrain with scattered vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient submerged ruins along rocky cliff face

agents.ego_description: swimming along the rocky cliff face examining detailed ancient stone structures and archways

entered.detail: detailed ancient stone buildings and archways integrated into the cliff

segments.scene_description: The character swims closely along the rocky cliff face, examining detailed ancient submerged architecture including stone buildings and archways. The cliff is now very close on the right, with scattered kelp and small fish visible. The open water of the kelp forest is left behind as the character explores the ruins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater journey that begins beside a massive submerged pyramid and transitions into the exploration of ruins built into a rocky cliffside. It begins with the character swimming alongside the ancient stepped structure in clear turquoise water, before ascending and turning away toward the open sea. As the pyramid fades into the background, the scene opens into a dense kelp forest where sunlight streams down in dramatic rays and a large manta ray glides through the distance. The camera then shifts toward a rocky cliff face adorned with colorful coral and schools of fish, as the wild kelp gives way to more structured terrain. Finally, the movement tightens along the cliff wall to reveal detailed submerged architecture, including stone buildings and archways carved directly into the rock.
